examples: What is she doing with a toaster in her bag?
When you pop a frozen waffle into the toaster, electrical energy turns into heat energy.
Unplug your toaster, finish that cup of coffee and leave those bacon cravings behind; breakfast in China is like nothing you've tasted before.
Sometimes you just can't remember if you turned off the toaster oven before leaving the house.
He also heads the clubby group of Toaster spotters who meet inside the cemetery.
